title: About Gateway ICT Polytechnic, Saapade
content: Gateway ICT Polytechnic, Saapade (GAPOSA) is a state-owned polytechnic established in 2006 by the Ogun State Government, one of four ICT-focused polytechnics set up by the state. It is accredited by the National Board for Technical Education (NBTE) and offers National Diploma (ND) and Higher National Diploma (HND) programmes across ICT, engineering, business, and other technical fields.

title: Campus Location and Address
content: The main campus is located at Km 55, Lagos-Ibadan Expressway, Saapade Estate, Ogun State, in Remo North Local Government Area. Postal addresses: PMB 2003 Isara-Remo, and PMB 2004 Ode-Remo.

title: Contact Information
content: General enquiry phone: +234 806 793 7140. Admissions/payment enquiries: 0813 869 1830 or 0806 793 7140, email payment@gaposa.edu.ng. Official website: new.gaposa.edu.ng. Application portal: onlineappsaapade.gaposa.edu.ng. Student portal: studentportal.gaposa.edu.ng. Department-specific direct contact lines are not published centrally — Information Not Available; ask the department office directly.

title: Leadership and Governance
content: The Polytechnic is led by a Rector as chief executive, supported by principal officers including the Registrar, Bursar, and Librarian. The current Rector is Dr. Sanni Kehinde Oseni, appointed following the recommendation of the Governing Council and approval of the Ogun State Governor, Prince (Dr.) Dapo Abiodun. Confirm current officeholders with the Registry, as appointments can change after this notice was written.

title: Vision and Mission
content: Publicly reported vision: to be a leading institution in producing skilled manpower in ICT and other technical fields. Publicly reported mission: to provide quality education combining theory with practical skills, fostering innovation and entrepreneurship. These statements are drawn from a third-party institutional directory rather than the Polytechnic's own official publication, so they should be verified against an official source (e.g. the student/staff handbook) before being treated as the exact, current wording.

title: Campus Facilities
content: Reported campus facilities include ICT laboratories, engineering workshops, a library, on-campus hostels, and a sports complex. Facility-specific details (opening hours, capacity, borrowing policy) are Information Not Available in public sources — confirm with the relevant service unit.

title: Academic Calendar
content: Information Not Available in public sources at the time of writing. Admission cycles (ND/HND application windows) are announced per session on the official application portal and via the Polytechnic's news page — check onlineappsaapade.gaposa.edu.ng and new.gaposa.edu.ng/?page_id=20 for the current session's dates rather than relying on a fixed calendar here.

title: Admission Information (ND and HND)
content: ND admission generally requires at least five credit passes (including English Language and Mathematics) in WAEC, NECO, or NABTEB, at not more than two sittings, plus a qualifying UTME score meeting the Polytechnic's cut-off for the chosen programme. HND admission requires a relevant ND at not below Lower Credit grade, plus (for most programmes) at least one year of post-ND industrial attachment (SIWES). Apply via onlineappsaapade.gaposa.edu.ng — create a profile, complete the Basic Details Form, pay, then complete the Detailed Application Form with O'level results and a passport photo. Exact fees change per session — Information Not Available here; confirm current fees on the application portal.
